inputs.label: Upper bound b
inputs.businessContext: Right endpoint of the interval, must be greater than a

inputs.label: f(a)
inputs.businessContext: Function value at the lower bound

inputs.label: f(b)
inputs.businessContext: Function value at the upper bound

inputs.label: Target value k
inputs.businessContext: Value to find between f(a) and f(b)

formulas.existsString: ((f_a <= k && k <= f_b) || (f_b <= k && k <= f_a)) ? 'Yes, a c exists.' : 'No, no guarantee.'
formulas.conditionDetail: 'f(a)=' + f_a + ', f(b)=' + f_b + ', k=' + k + ': k is ' + (((f_a <= k && k <= f_b) || (f_b <= k && k <= f_a)) ? 'inside' : 'outside') + ' the range.'
